Chu-Hsiang Wu Page 2 DESIGN and SELECTION of GRAVEL PACK and SAND CONTROL SCREENS, UT Austin Jun. 2013-present. Develop analytical, DEM, and Monte Carlo models for predicting sand production through gravel packs and sand control screens. Accurately predicted 6 sand production lab-test results obtained from operators with less than 15% error using the developed model. Invented a DEM-based approach for extracting pore throat size distribution of complex packings. Results show that the pore throat sizes within gravel packs are usually between 1/5 to 1/9 of the effective gravel size.
